data.body: Vote progress: 565/566/567/570 Verified+1 & LLM-Review+1; 568/569 LLM+1 pending Verified; 571-575 pending. 564 (a41f) got LLM-Review+1 but Verified-1 = FLAKE: test_transition_open_children git-lock 'could not parse HEAD' transient (unrelated to 1-line README fix; changes stacked on 564 passed Verified). Posted 'recheck' on 564 to re-run CI. resolve_symbol test passed in CI (confirms it was a local-venv-only artifact).
